title: Stop-solves-current-pressure interaction
summary: Create features for the strategic condition where the current tyre cannot finish but a next-lap fresh tyre can.
rationale: The strongest strategy features combine two facts: the current stint is becoming untenable and a stop is now viable. Isolated current-window or fresh-window flags were useful, but their intersection is more operational.
implementation_hint: Use current-tyre finish pressure and next-stop fresh feasibility to add binary and continuous interaction features: current-window-fails-and-fresh-slick-can-finish, pressure margin times best fresh margin, and late-race versions using estimated laps remaining.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with medium-high confidence.
risk: If implemented only as hard thresholds, it may miss gradual strategy pressure; pair flags with continuous signed margins.
